findings.title: Table Storage recovery requirements are not implementable as written
findings.description: Azure Table Storage does not provide built-in backup or point-in-time restore. The stated daily backup with manual restore is not natively supported.
findings.recommendation: Relax recovery expectation for demo scope, or require a custom export mechanism with realistic RTO/RPO, or switch persistence to a service with built-in backup.

findings.title: EU-only residency is not reconciled with open-ended social login
findings.description: Social identity providers (Google, etc.) may process identity data outside the EU, creating a gap with the stated EU-only data residency requirement.
findings.recommendation: Clarify that EU residency applies to Azure-hosted data only. Name approved providers and record the compliance assumption for external identity processing.

findings.title: Right-to-erasure is not mapped to retained order data
findings.description: GDPR right to erasure is required but data retention rules (90d PII, 1yr orders) do not specify if orders are anonymized or deleted on erasure request.
findings.recommendation: Define which fields are PII, whether retained orders are anonymized or deleted, and the deletion workflow.

findings.title: Privileged staff and owner access is underspecified
findings.description: Staff/owner roles lack a defined identity source or authorization model distinct from customer social login.
findings.recommendation: Specify identity source for staff (e.g. allowlisted emails) and how elevated roles are assigned.

findings.title: Order status and staff visibility use unmeasurable 'real time' language
findings.description: 'Real time' is not defined. Polling every 30s vs true push are materially different implementations.
findings.recommendation: Replace 'real time' with measurable behavior (e.g. max 30s polling interval acceptable for demo).

findings.title: Network and policy assumptions are presented as settled facts
findings.description: Public endpoint and no-private-networking choices are stated as decisions, but governance discovery has not yet run.
findings.recommendation: Mark as provisional assumptions pending governance discovery in Step 3.5.
